policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-07 - Deny Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) from all domains'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-07 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site Slot should not have CORS configured to allow every resource to access your apps
policyDefinition.description: This policy enforces that Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) should not allow all domains (wildcard) to access the app. Only allow required domains to interact with the app.

drcp.name: AppServiceSiteSlotCORSAllowAnyResource
drcp.controlDesc: Deny Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) from all domains

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
